assertions.title: New accounts enter onboarding before using the dashboard

steps.action: Open /login?return_to=%2Fdashboard%3Ftab%3Doverview in the assigned browser session as a guest.
steps.expected: The auth entry surface is actionable for a new account sign-up.
steps.observed: The sign-up form rendered with Name, Email, Password, and Sign Up controls.

steps.action: Create a brand-new account with the disposable happy-path email.
steps.expected: Successful sign-up should route the brand-new user into onboarding before protected dashboard use.
steps.observed: The browser left /login and landed on http://dashboard.faworra.localhost:1355/onboarding.

evidence.network: The browser request log captured POST http://api.faworra.localhost:1355/api/auth/sign-up/email followed by onboarding document/render requests; the session landed on /onboarding instead of entering the protected dashboard immediately.

assertions.title: Onboarding validates required fields before submit

steps.action: Open the selector-driven Country and Base currency controls and search for arbitrary raw values such as ZZZINVALID.
steps.expected: The normal selector surface should prevent arbitrary country/currency text from being entered as a submitted value.
steps.observed: Country search showed 'No country found.' and currency search showed 'No currency found.' while the selected values remained the canonical defaults Ghana / GHS.

steps.action: Leave the company field invalid and attempt to submit onboarding.
steps.expected: Invalid onboarding state should be blocked client-side and no onboarding submit request should be sent.
steps.observed: The Create fashion workspace button became disabled and the browser captured no onboarding.complete request while the form remained invalid.

steps.action: Blur the company field with a short invalid value ('a').
steps.expected: Field-level validation feedback should appear for the invalid company input.
steps.observed: No inline error text, alert, or aria-invalid state appeared; the form only stayed disabled.

evidence.network: No onboarding submit request was captured while the form was invalid. Selector searches for arbitrary raw values yielded no selectable results and preserved Ghana / GHS as the only active selections.
evidence.finalState: The form blocked submission, but did not render the field-level validation feedback required by the contract.

assertions.issues: Client-side blocking is present, but field-level validation feedback is missing. The normal selector UX prevents arbitrary raw country/currency text, yet invalid company input produced no inline error state or message.

assertions.title: Onboarding normalizes codes and activates a usable workspace

steps.action: Complete onboarding with valid GH/GHS-style data using the selector defaults and a valid company name.
steps.expected: The workspace bootstrap succeeds and activates a usable protected session.
steps.observed: Submitting onboarding navigated the user into the dashboard.

steps.action: Inspect the protected dashboard after onboarding success.
steps.expected: The created workspace is visible and protected data is available.
steps.observed: The dashboard rendered 'Workspace: Retry Atelier Ghana' and 'API: This is private'.

evidence.network: The request log captured POST http://api.faworra.localhost:1355/trpc/onboarding.complete?batch=1 followed by GET http://api.faworra.localhost:1355/trpc/privateData?batch=1&input=%7B%7D and dashboard document/render requests.
evidence.renderedState: Dashboard welcome shell for Onboarding Retry 20260405T004441 with active workspace label 'Retry Atelier Ghana' and protected privateData content visible.

assertions.title: Onboarding is skipped once a usable workspace exists

steps.action: While authenticated with the newly onboarded workspace, revisit /onboarding.
steps.expected: The app should redirect away from onboarding to the dashboard.
steps.observed: Opening /onboarding landed immediately on http://dashboard.faworra.localhost:1355/dashboard with the dashboard shell visible.

evidence.network: The request log captured repeated GET /onboarding document requests that resolved to GET /dashboard document requests in the authenticated onboarded session.

assertions.title: Onboarding failure keeps the user in recovery

steps.action: Create a second brand-new disposable account and reach /onboarding for failure-path coverage.
steps.expected: A fresh user should be available on the onboarding surface before bootstrap submission.
steps.observed: The second disposable account landed on http://dashboard.faworra.localhost:1355/onboarding.

steps.action: Abort only the session's POST /trpc/onboarding.complete?batch=1 request and submit valid onboarding data.
steps.expected: A real request failure should keep the user on onboarding with visible error feedback and no partial navigation into the protected dashboard.
steps.observed: The browser remained on /onboarding and the captured screenshot showed a bottom-right toast reading 'Failed to fetch'.

evidence.network: A session-scoped route abort was applied to POST http://api.faworra.localhost:1355/trpc/onboarding.complete?batch=1. The request was attempted, but the browser stayed on /onboarding and did not navigate into /dashboard.
evidence.errorFeedback: Screenshot evidence shows a visible 'Failed to fetch' toast on the onboarding page after the aborted submit.

assertions.title: Sign-up to onboarding to dashboard yields a usable first workspace

steps.action: Start from /login?return_to=%2Fdashboard%3Ftab%3Doverview and create a brand-new account.
steps.expected: The sign-up flow should enter onboarding instead of granting immediate protected dashboard use.
steps.observed: The new account landed on /onboarding first.

steps.expected: The same session should end in a usable dashboard with an active first workspace and protected team data.
steps.observed: The flow ended on /dashboard with workspace label 'Retry Atelier Ghana' and private API data visible.

evidence.network: Across the full flow the request log captured POST /api/auth/sign-up/email, POST /trpc/onboarding.complete?batch=1, and GET /trpc/privateData?batch=1&input=%7B%7D while the browser progressed from /login?return_to=%2Fdashboard%3Ftab%3Doverview to /onboarding to /dashboard.

frictions.description: The seeded failure-path user auth-shell-round1-teamless@example.com did not behave as teamless during this retry. After sign-in it landed on a dashboard workspace labelled 'Recovery Threads' instead of the onboarding recovery surface.
frictions.resolution: Used a second disposable sign-up account and a session-scoped network abort on onboarding.complete to exercise the real boundary failure without disturbing shared state.

frictions.description: Country and currency are selector-driven with Ghana / GHS defaults and could not be cleared into an incomplete state through normal keyboard/mouse interactions in this session.
frictions.resolution: Validated selector behavior by proving arbitrary raw search text returned 'No country found.' / 'No currency found.' and preserved canonical selections, then used company-name invalid state plus the lack of field-level feedback to assess the contract.

summary: Tested 6 onboarding/browser assertions: 5 passed and 1 failed. New-account sign-up correctly entered onboarding before dashboard use, valid onboarding produced a usable first workspace, onboarded users were redirected away from /onboarding, and an induced submit failure kept the user on onboarding with visible error feedback; VAL-ONBOARD-002 failed because invalid onboarding state was blocked but field-level validation feedback did not appear.
